title: Privacy Policy
intro: We respect your privacy and collect only the data needed to operate the social-media-v1 service.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
body: Account data: email address, name (optional), password hash.
Technical data: IP address, device and browser info, access logs.
Integration data: tokens of connected channels, stored encrypted.

sections.heading: 2. How we use data
body: To provide and improve the service, for authentication and security.
To send service notifications and account/billing emails.
We do not sell personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 3. Storage and protection
body: Data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Employee access is restricted and logged.
Raw data is retained for a limited time; aggregated metrics may be kept longer.

sections.heading: 4. Your rights
body: You can request an export of your data and delete your account in settings.
After account deletion, personal data is removed within the defined period.
